parental_control.label: Parental Control
parental_control.description: Marketed for monitoring a minor child; some legal basis typically exists.

mutual_safety.label: Mutual Family Safety
mutual_safety.description: Opt-in, reciprocal location/status sharing among consenting adults.

partner_trust.label: Partner / Relationship Monitoring
partner_trust.description: A partner's phone number is entered to monitor their chats, calls, or location.

overt_stalkerware.label: Overt Stalkerware
overt_stalkerware.description: Covert install, hidden operation, full content capture; historically subject to FTC enforcement.

number_only_lookup.label: Number-Only Lookup / Link-Based Geolocation
number_only_lookup.description: No install, no device access. Only the target's phone number is entered; a link is sent and opening it exposes location to the requester.
